tests.name: Alt+Left restores the previous navigation snapshot goBack on a 4-entry history with headIndex=3 returns headIndex=2
Alt+Right re-advances after going back goForward on a 4-entry history with headIndex=2 returns headIndex=3
A new cross-reference action after Alt+Left clears the forward stack pushEntry on a history with headIndex < entries.length-1 truncates the tail before pushing
Alt+Left at the start of history is a no-op with end-of-history cue goBack on a history with headIndex=0 returns the same history
Alt+Right at end of history is a no-op goForward on a history with headIndex=entries.length-1 returns the same history
For any sequence of navigation actions the history never exceeds 50 entries property: |entries| <= 50 and 0 <= headIndex < |entries| after any sequence of pushEntry/goBack/goForward
LRU eviction at cap of 50 evicts the oldest entry and shifts headIndex pushEntry on a 50-entry history at headIndex=49 evicts entries[0] and stays at headIndex=49
emptyHistory sentinel encodes the no-head-yet state emptyHistory has zero entries and headIndex=-1
canGoBack is true for any history with headIndex > 0 canGoBack returns true on a 4-entry history at headIndex=2
LRU cap does not evict when the resulting stack would be exactly at the cap pushEntry on a 49-entry history at headIndex=48 grows to 50 without dropping the oldest entry
